actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The theory is strong, but the foundation is weak.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: The theory is strong, but the foundation is not very stable.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: He's trying to build a strong case for his theory.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: He's trying to build a strong floor to be the groundwork for his theory.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: His theory collapsed under the weight of evidence.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: His theory collapsed like a pile of bricks under the weight of external scrutiny.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: That's a weak foundation for your argument.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: It's not good to have a weak foundation for your argument.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: His theory was quickly demolished by the evidence.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: A bad theory is quickly demolished by evidence.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: A good theory should be incredibly well-constructed.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: That argument is weak - it's just a building of straw.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: That argument is weak - just like a building made of straw.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: A weak theory is knocked over as easily as a building made with sticks.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: His theory fell apart under close inspection.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: A poor theory falls apart under close inspection.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: A solid theory should be built on a sturdy foundation of evidence.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: His theory was built on a faulty premise.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: A poor theory is built on a faulty premise.
